data.title: Bullish (NYSE: BLSH) releases December 2025 metrics including trading volume, spreads, and volatility for Bitcoin and Ethereum.
data.description: In December 2025, Bullish (NYSE: BLSH), a worldwide digital asset platform catering to institutions, disclosed its monthly statistics on January 9, 2026. The report encompassed crucial data like trading volume, average trading spread, and volatility indicators for Bitcoin and Ethereum. For further details and definitions concerning these metrics, interested parties can access the monthly metrics packages provided for investors.

data.title: Lindsay Corp declares $0.37/share quarterly dividend, payable Feb 27, 2026 to shareholders (10.5M shares outstanding).
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, Lindsay Corporation, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure equipment, disclosed that its Board of Directors has authorized a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.37 per share. This dividend will be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders on record by February 13, 2026. As of January 5, 2026, Lindsay Corporation had about 10.5 million shares in circulation, traded on the NYSE under the symbol LNN.

data.title: Ashton Woods USA L.L.C. to hold conference call on Jan 15, 2026 at 11:00 AM EST to discuss Quarterly Report.
data.description: Ashton Woods USA L.L.C. in Alpharetta, GA revealed today that their Quarterly Report for the fiscal quarter concluding on November 30, 2025, is anticipated to be available on the Company's official website by Thursday, January 15, 2026. A conference call will be conducted on the same day at 11:00 AM EST to delve into the Quarterly Report and the operational outcomes of the Company for the aforementioned quarter.

data.title: Magnet Defense acquires ATG to speed up AI integration for national security - boosting autonomy solutions.
data.description: Miami, as of January 9, 2026, Magnet Defense LLC, a company specializing in autonomous national security maritime platforms for fleet operations and missile defense missions, has confirmed its acquisition of Advanced Technology Group through a definitive agreement. This move signifies a significant development in the defense industry, with Magnet Defense LLC expanding its capabilities through this acquisition.

data.title: Brookfield Asset Management renews its bid to buy up to 36,946,177 Class A Shares, 10% of the public float, till Jan 12, 2027.
data.description: Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. (NYSE: BAM, TSX: BAM) has announced the approval for the renewal of its normal course issuer bid, allowing the purchase of up to 36,946,177 Class A Limited Voting Shares ("Class A Shares"). This represents around 10% of the total public float of the company's outstanding Class A Shares. The purchases will take place on the NYSE, TSX, and/or alternative trading systems from January 13, 2026, to January 12, 2027. Brookfield Asset Management will buy the Class A Shares at the market price during acquisition or at another permissible price.

data.title: Farm Implements Market to reach $66.21 billion by 2032 from $43.27 billion in 2025, with CAGR of 6.3% - MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 9, 2026, data from MarketsandMarkets™ indicates that the Farm Implements Market is projected to grow significantly, reaching USD 66.21 billion by 2032. This is a substantial increase from the USD 43.27 billion recorded in 2025, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.3%. The market insights are further detailed in 200 market data Tables, 100 Figures, spread across 350 Pages.

data.title: Liquidia Corp announces preliminary 2025 YUTREPIA net sales and corporate updates at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco. Full-year sales figures to be reported in February 2026.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Liquidia Corporation (NASDAQ: LQDA) based in Morrisville, N.C., revealed preliminary figures for their net product sales for the full year of 2025. These unaudited numbers pertain to YUTREPIA™ (treprostinil) inhalation powder. Liquidia is a biopharmaceutical firm focused on transforming care for patients grappling with complex respiratory and vascular illnesses. Furthermore, they disclosed updates concerning the commercial introduction of their product and advancements in their clinical pipeline. Liquidia will delve into these updates during their involvement in the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference scheduled for January 12–14, 2026, in San Francisco. The corporation intends to release fully audited financial outcomes for the year closing on December 31, 2025, in February 2026.

data.title: Rain raises $250M in Series C funding, bringing total funding to $338M with company valued at $1.95B - up 17x in 10 months. Expanding payments infrastructure for enterprises.
data.description: Under the leadership of ICONIQ, Rain has secured a new round of funding, pushing its total funds raised to exceed $338 million. This increase in funding has also elevated the company's valuation to $1.95 billion, marking a remarkable growth of over 17 times within a span of 10 months. The fresh injection of funds will empower Rain to expand its global presence while ensuring compliance regulations are met, enhance its platform functionalities, and facilitate the development of innovative products that seek to revolutionize the industry.

data.title: Global Controlled Environment Agriculture market hit USD 87.19 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 271.01 billion by 2032.
data.description: In January 9, 2026, Austin, Texas and Tokyo were reported to have experienced a significant development in the global Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) Market. DataM Intelligence revealed that the market had already reached a value of USD 87.19 billion in 2024. Furthermore, it is anticipated that the market will see substantial growth, with projections indicating it will expand to USD 271.01 billion by 2032. This growth is expected to occur at a robust Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.23% during the specified period.

data.title: Comstock Metals gets final permit for recycling facility in Silver Springs, NV, to process waste solar panels; industry-scale facility approved by NDEP-BSMM.
data.description: Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) and Comstock Metals LLC have recently obtained their Written Determination Permit from the Nevada Division of Environmental Protection for their waste solar panels and photovoltaics processing facility in Silver Springs, NV. This facility, set to be an industry-scale operation, is the sole North American, zero-landfill solution for end-of-life solar panel recycling. With this pivotal approval in hand, the company is now fully permitted to proceed with its plans to launch the facility, marking a significant milestone towards its goal. The processing plant in Silver Springs, NV, will be the first of its kind on a large scale and is progressing as scheduled.
